answers.question: How do I build a resume for free with AI?
answers.answer: Open HiHired, pick a template, paste your work history, and let the AI suggest bullet points that match the job description. You can edit inline, run the ATS diagnostic, and download a branded PDF for free.
steps: Select one of nine ATS-proven layouts designed by recruiters.
Drop in your resume or job notes so the AI can parse roles, skills, and achievements.
Use the job description field to generate tailored, keyword-rich bullet points in seconds.

answers.question: What makes an ATS-friendly resume?
answers.answer: Use a single-column layout, align dates on the right, and mirror keywords from the job description. HiHired’s checklist verifies headings, detects graphics that can break parsing, and confirms you meet ATS thresholds.
steps: Ensures parsers read content left to right without tables.
Paste the JD so AI can merge the right skills and verbs into each section.
Add metrics (%, $, #) to increase ATS confidence and recruiter trust.

answers.question: How can I tailor my resume to a job description quickly?
answers.answer: Paste the job post into the JD field, press generate, and HiHired rewrites your bullets with the exact skills and metrics hiring managers mention. You approve the edits, compare before/after ATS scores, and ship the PDF.
steps: Copy the entire job description, including preferred skills.
Mark achievements you want to emphasize so AI keeps your voice.
Use AI suggestions to inject the employer’s keywords and KPIs.

answers.question: How do I share my AI-built resume securely?
answers.answer: After exporting, click share link to create a trackable URL. HiHired hosts the PDF, lets you expire access anytime, and logs each open so you know when recruiters read it.
steps: Finalize your resume and export the polished PDF.
Use the Share panel to spin up an encrypted URL with optional password.
Define expiry dates or download limits for agencies and partners.

answers.question: how to auto fill job applications chrome extension
answers.answer: The fastest way to auto fill job applications with a Chrome extension is to install HiHired Auto-Fill, save or import your resume on hihired.org, then click Fill Application on any supported form. HiHired reads the page, matches fields to your profile, fills them in seconds, and helps you apply faster without repetitive typing.
steps: Add HiHired Auto-Fill from the Chrome Web Store for free.
Build or import your resume at hihired.org/builder so the extension can use your saved experience, skills, and contact details.
Navigate to a Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, LinkedIn, iCIMS, or company career page application.
tags: how to auto fill job applications chrome extension

answers.question: How to tailor resume to job description with AI?
answers.answer: On any job posting page, click the HiHired extension and select 'Tailor Resume to Job'. The AI extracts the job description, rewrites your resume to match it, and generates a downloadable tailored PDF in about 60 seconds. No copy-pasting required.
steps: Navigate to any job listing on LinkedIn, Greenhouse, Lever, or any company site.
Open the HiHired extension and click the 'Tailor Resume to Job' button.
AI reads the job description, rewrites your resume to match keywords and requirements.

answers.question: best free AI resume builder
answers.answer: HiHired is one of the best free AI resume builder options in 2026 because it does more than generate a resume. On hihired.org, you can build or import a resume, tailor it to each job description, generate a recruiter-ready PDF, and auto-fill job applications with the same profile, all without a required signup to get started.
steps: No signup required. Start building your resume immediately.
Upload a PDF/DOCX or start from scratch with AI-guided prompts.
Pick from 9 recruiter-approved templates optimized for applicant tracking systems.

answers.question: AI resume builder with cover letter
answers.answer: HiHired is an AI resume builder with cover letter support built into the same flow. Build or import your resume, tailor it to the role, then generate a matching AI cover letter from the same profile and job description in about 60 seconds.
steps: Upload your resume or create one in HiHired so the AI has your real experience and achievements.
Add the full job posting so HiHired can tailor both the resume and the cover letter to the role.
Click generate to create an AI cover letter that matches your resume and the target job.
tags: ai resume builder with cover letter

answers.question: What's the best Simplify Copilot alternative for auto-filling job applications?
answers.answer: HiHired Auto-Fill is the best Simplify Copilot alternative because it combines auto-fill with an AI resume builder and cover letter generator. Simplify only fills forms; HiHired also creates tailored resumes for each job. Both are free, but HiHired gives you the complete toolkit.
steps: Free Chrome extension — works on Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, LinkedIn, and 100+ more.
Unlike Simplify, HiHired includes a full AI resume builder with 9 ATS templates.
One click fills name, email, phone, work history, education, EEO fields.

answers.question: How to auto-fill Greenhouse and Workday job applications?
answers.answer: Install the HiHired Chrome extension and navigate to any Greenhouse or Workday job application. Click the extension icon, and it fills all fields from your saved resume data. It handles multi-page forms, dropdown selects, React components, and EEO fields automatically.
steps: Free Chrome extension from the Chrome Web Store.
Build or import your resume at hihired.org — your data is saved for auto-fill.
Navigate to any job posting on boards.greenhouse.io, *greenhouse.io, or workday.com.

answers.question: How to write a professional summary for a resume with AI?
answers.answer: Paste your work history and target job description into HiHired. The AI generates a professional summary that highlights your most relevant achievements and matches the role's keywords. Edit inline and see the ATS score update in real-time.
steps: Upload your resume or enter your work history manually.
Paste the target role so AI knows what to emphasize.
AI writes 2-3 sentence summary highlighting your best-fit achievements.
